response.reasoning: Bogdan has over 12 years of full-stack experience, far exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with consistent work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms like AWS. He has direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, aligning with the required AI agent development skill. His work with Vitest is implied through extensive testing practices (TDD, CI/CD, Fluent-Asserts, Trial test runner) and workshops on testing. He has deep backend/frontend experience across multiple stacks, including Nest.js-like patterns via Node.js microservices, and has used PostgreSQL/MySQL/MongoDB. He has containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and Git expertise. His open-source contributions and teaching demonstrate communication and process improvement skills. His MIT CS degree satisfies the education requirement. Concerns include no explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the resume (though equivalents exist), limited evidence of Kotlin/Java in recent roles (though used historically), and German language being only basic, which may impact collaboration in Berlin-based teams.
strengths: 12+ years of full-stack experience with strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven AI-agent infrastructure experience and open-source testing tool development
Deep expertise in cloud, containerization, CI/CD, and end-to-end system design
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in current projects
Kotlin/Java experience is historical, not recent
German language proficiency is only basic in a Berlin-based role
response.justification: Bogdan exceeds the core requirements with extensive full-stack experience, proven AI-agent work, and strong engineering practices. While he lacks explicit mention of Nest.js and Vitest, his deep Node.js and testing expertise with equivalent tools (TDD, CI/CD, custom runners) suggests rapid adaptability. The minor language gap is outweighed by his technical depth, open-source leadership, and alignment with the role’s architectural and automation focus.
